meta.coverageLabels: n/a — coverage shells (Cover 2/3 etc.) are not in public data
meta.pressureNote: pressureRate = QB hits + sacks per dropback (public proxy; hurries are not in public data)
meta.note: Season-to-date historical tendencies, not a live feed or a prediction.
meta.zones: goal-line<=5, red-zone<=20, plus-territory<=40, midfield<=59, own-territory<=89, backed-up>=90 (yards to opp end zone)
